label: Navbar
summary: A horizontal bar of bevel-chip links; the current page renders sunken.
era: The row of bevel-edged button links under the site logo, current page pressed in like a held key.

classes.name: rs-navbar
classes.role: horizontal row of bevel-chip links; wraps to two rows below svga, never a hamburger

a11y: A <nav> landmark with an aria-label; the current page carries aria-current="page", that is what renders it sunken.
